S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepárate para entrar en la Zona bajo tu propia responsabilidad para intentar hacer una fortuna o descubrir la verdad que se oculta en el corazón de Chernóbil.                                                        
  
 * FASCINANTE HISTORIA NO LINEAL EN UN MUNDO ABIERTO FLUIDO 
 * NUMEROSOS ENEMIGOS Y CIENTOS DE COMBINACIONES DE ARMAS 
 * MUTANTES LEGENDARIOS CON COMPORTAMIENTOS DISTINTOS 
 * ARTEFACTOS VALIOSÍSIMOS Y ANOMALÍAS INMISERICORDES 
  Descubre el legendario universo de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. y su experiencia!
 
 
  Acerca del juego La Zona, un lugar lleno de insondables maravillas y siniestras amenazas, es el antiguo territorio de exclusión cercano a la Planta de energía nuclear de Chernóbil. El sector más peligroso de la Tierra se cubrió aún más de misterio tras un extraño accidente en 2006. Está repleto de anomalías con valiosos artefactos, voraces mutantes y mezquinos matones, además de stalkers que buscan una nueva vida y formas de enriquecerse… ¡Ese podrías ser tú en S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! BÚSQUEDA 
 Para sobrevivir, un stalker que se las precie nunca puede dejar de buscar. Son cosas como los valiosos trofeos, el equipamiento y los suministros, los nuevos amigos, los atajos o las respuestas a los enigmas más macabros de estas tierras las que te ofrecen una oportunidad de eludir la muerte, así que prepárate para una incursión en busca de tu destino en el centro de la Zona, el lugar más protegido contra visitantes indeseados. PELIGROS 
 El viaje de un stalker hasta su meta nunca es fácil. Una anomalía traicionera capaz de acabar incluso con los luchadores más veteranos, un voraz mutante extraviado, una traición incomprensible... hay muchas cosas que pueden costarte la vida. Prepárate para poner a prueba tu destreza y tu coraje para resistir a rivales y mutantes superiores a ti en número. Estate alerta incluso cuando estés a solas, pues, en la Zona, casi nada es lo que parece a primera vista. DESOLACIÓN 
 Estas tierras inhóspitas atrapadas en un eterno otoño están llenas de cientos de vagabundos. Sin embargo, un stalker siempre va por su cuenta y se enfrenta a peligros a menudo ocultos. Escucha con atención, calcula bien cada paso que das y no confíes en nadie salvo en ti y en tu contador Geiger. Solo la intuición combinada con maestría, valentía y mente fría pueden salvar a un stalker libre de perderse en la Zona.
 
  Características del juego: 
 
   Una mezcla de elementos de acción, sigilo, horror, supervivencia y rol en un oscuro marco de ciencia ficción en Europa del Este. 
   La particular atmósfera de soledad en un lugar peligroso donde se ha parado el tiempo para siempre.
   Ubicaciones trasladadas al juego desde la zona de exclusión de Chernóbil real: Prypiat, la central nuclear y muchas más.
   Inteligencia artificial de rivales y PNJ que viven sus propias vidas y son capaces de reaccionar a los cambios.
   Una historia no lineal en la que tus decisiones te llevan a uno de varios finales.
   Cambios dinámicos en el ciclo de día y noche, y condiciones meteorológicas que afectan a la forma de jugar. 
   Modos multijugador con hasta 32 jugadores en un mapa.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Préparez-vous à entrer dans la Zone à vos risques et périls pour faire fortune et qui sait peut-être trouver la vérité qui se cache dans le cœur de Chernobyl.
  * UNE HISTOIRE ÉPIQUE ET NON LINÉAIRE DANS UN MONDE ENTIÈREMENT OUVERT
 * DES ENNEMIS VARIÉS ET DES CENTAINES DE COMBINAISONS D'ARMES 
 * DES MUTANTS LÉGENDAIRES AVEC DES MODÈLES COMPORTEMENTAUX UNIQUES 
 * DES ARTEFACTS INESTIMABLES ET DES ANOMALIES IMPITOYABLES 
  Découvrez l'univers légendaire de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. et vivez une expérience incroyable!
 
 
  À propos du jeu La Zone, un endroit rempli de phénomènes incroyables et de terribles menaces, ancienne zone d’exclusion près de la centrale nucléaire de Chernobyl. Le mystère entourant l’endroit le plus dangereux de la terre s’est encore épaissi après un étrange incident en 2006. Des anomalies contenant de précieux artefacts, des mutants affamés et des rapaces de la pire espèce grouillent sur ces terres où les Stalkers affluent à la recherche d’une nouvelle vie et de façons de s’enrichir. Incarnez l’un d’entre eux dans S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl ! RECHERCHE 
 Pour survivre, un vrai Stalker ne doit jamais cesser ses recherches. Les trophées de valeur, l’équipement et les provisions, les nouveaux amis, les raccourcis ou les réponses aux énigmes les plus mystérieuses de ces terres... tous ces éléments vous donneront une petite chance de survie. Alors, préparez-vous à partir à l’aventure à la recherche de votre destin au centre de la Zone, un lieu top secret à l’abri des regards indésirables. DANGERS 
 La voie d’un Stalker est toujours parsemée d’embûches. Des anomalies sournoises pouvant terrasser les combattants les plus aguerris, des mutants voraces en liberté semant le chaos, des traîtrises cinglantes... voilà qui risque de vous coûter la vie. Exploitez au mieux vos compétences et faites preuve de bon sens pour échapper à vos rivaux et résister aux mutants toujours plus nombreux. Restez sur vos gardes quand vous vous retrouvez seul. Ici, dans la Zone, rien ne ressemble à ce qu’il y paraît au premier abord. DÉSOLATION 
 Ces terres désolées aux allures d’automne éternel regorgent de centaines de vagabonds. Mais un Stalker est toujours livré à lui-même, forcé d’affronter des dangers souvent invisibles. Tendez toujours l’oreille, calculez chacun de vos pas et ne faites confiance qu’à vous-même et à votre compteur Geiger. Seule l’intuition associée au talent et au courage sans faille peut empêcher un Stalker de se perdre dans la Zone.
 
  Caractéristiques du jeu : 
 
   Un mélange d’action, d’horreur et de survie ponctué d’éléments de RPG au cœur d’un environnement de science-fiction lugubre de l’Europe de l’Est.
   Atmosphère unique de solitude dans un lieu dangereux où le temps s’est arrêté à jamais.
   Lieux réels tirés de la véritable zone d’exclusion de Tchernobyl transférés dans le jeu : Pripyat, la centrale nucléaire de Tchernobyl et bien d’autres encore.
   Des adversaires et des PNJ intelligents capables de mener leur propre vie et de réagir aux changements.
   Un scénario non linéaire dans lequel vos choix mèneront à de nombreuses fins différentes.
   Un cycle jour-nuit et des conditions météo aux changements dynamiques qui modifient l’expérience de jeu.
   Des modes multijoueur pouvant compter jusqu’à 32 joueurs sur une carte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel Die Zone, ein Ort voller unergründlicher Wunder und finsterer Bedrohungen, ist das ehemalige Sperrgebiet nahe des Atomkraftwerks Tschernobyl. Der gefährlichste Ort der Welt wirft seit einem mysteriösen Unfall im Jahr 2006 noch mehr Fragen auf. Seither wimmelt es in dem Gebiet von Anomalien mit kostbaren Artefakten, hungrigen Mutanten, gierigen Banditen und Stalkern, die auf der Suche nach einem neuen Leben und dem großen Geld sind … Werde einer von ihnen in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! DIE UNAUFHÖRLICHE SUCHE 
 Um ihr Überleben zu sichern, müssen Stalker unaufhörlich suchen und sammeln: Wertvolle Trophäen, Ausrüstung und Vorräte, neue Freunde, Abkürzungen oder auch Antworten auf die düstersten Rätsel dieses Gebiets können dazu beitragen, ihre Überlebenschancen zu erhöhen. Stell dich auf der Suche nach deinem Schicksal also auf Beutezüge im Herzen der Zone ein – jenem Ort, der wie kein anderer vor ungebetenen Gästen geschützt wird. GEFAHREN AN JEDER ECKE 
 Der Weg eines Stalkers zu seinem Ziel ist niemals ein Spaziergang: Von heimtückischen Anomalien, die selbst erfahrenste Soldaten in die Knie zwingen, über Scharen raubgieriger Mutanten bis hin zu bitterem Verrat – all diese Faktoren können dich das Leben kosten. Verlasse dich auf deine Fähigkeiten und deinen Schneid, um gegen die Vielzahl an Rivalen und Mutanten zu bestehen. Bleib wachsam, selbst wenn du allein bist, denn hier in der Zone ist selten etwas so, wie es auf den ersten Blick scheint. TROSTLOSIGKEIT 
 Die trostlose, im ewigen Herbst gefangene Landschaft wird von Hunderten von Landstreichern heimgesucht. Dennoch sind Stalker stets auf sich allein gestellt und stoßen häufig auf ungeahnte Gefahren. Spitze deine Ohren, plane jeden Schritt voraus und vertraue niemandem außer dir selbst und dem Geigerzähler. Nur die eigene Intuition im Zusammenspiel mit ihren Fähigkeiten und ihrem unbändigen Mut können Stalker davor bewahren, sich in der Zone zu verlieren.
 
  Features: 
 
   Eine Kombination aus Action-, Stealth-, Horror-, Survival- und Rollenspielelementen in einer düsteren, osteuropäischen Sci-Fi-Welt.
   Eine einzigartige Atmosphäre der Einsamkeit an einem gefährlichen Ort, an dem die Zeit für immer stillsteht.
   Gebiete der realen Tschernobyl-Sperrzone, die ins Spiel übernommen wurden: Prypjat, das Atomkraftwerk Tschernobyl und viele mehr.
   Clevere KI für Gegner und NPCs, die eigenen Aktivitäten nachgehen und auf Veränderungen reagieren können.
   Eine nichtlineare Story, in der deine Entscheidungen zahlreiche verschiedene Enden herbeiführen können.
   Dynamische Änderungen des Tag-Nacht-Rhythmus und der Wetterbedingungen mit Auswirkungen auf das Gameplay.
   Mehrspielermodi mit bis zu 32 Spielern auf einer Karte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Acerca do jogo The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
   
 富を築くか、あるいはチョルノブイリの心臓部に隠された真実を求めて、危険なゾーンに足を踏み入れましょう。   
  * シームレスなオープンワールドで繰り広げられる壮大な非線形のストーリー
 * 多種多様な敵、そして何百通りもの組み合わせが可能な武器 
 * 異なる行動モデルを持つ伝説的なミュータント 
 * 計り知れない価値があるアーティファクトと容赦ないアノーマリー 
  伝説的なS.T.A.L.K.E.Rの世界とゲーム体験を楽しもう。!
 
 
  ゲームについて 底知れぬ謎と不吉な脅威に満ちた場所、ゾーン。かつてチョルノブイリ原子力発電所の近くに存在した立ち入り禁止区域である。地球上で最も危険なこの場所は、2006年の得体の知れない事故の後、謎がさらに深まった。貴重なアーティファクトを持つアノマリー、飢えたミュータント、強欲な悪党たちが、新しい生活と一攫千金を狙うストーカーたちと共にこの地に押し寄せた。『S.T.A.L.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl』で未知との遭遇を楽しもう。 探索 
 真のストーカーとして生き残るためには探索を続けなければならない。貴重なトロフィー、装備、物資、新たな仲間、近道、そしてこの地の謎を解き明かすことが、生き残る可能性を高めるのである。邪魔者たちによる鉄壁の警護が敷かれたゾーン中心部で、自らの運命を切り開け。 危険 
 ストーカーの目的地までの道のりは、決して平坦なものではない。経験豊富な人間でさえも太刀打ちできない危険なアノマリー、貪欲なミュータント、裏切り、これらのどれもがプレイヤーの命を奪うことになりかねない。数で勝る強敵やミュータントに対抗できるのは自身の腕と度量のみ。一人でいるときも油断は禁物。ここゾーンでは、想定外の事態は当たり前なのだから…。 荒廃 
 この荒涼とした常秋の地は、数多の浮浪者で溢れている。しかし、ストーカーは常に一人で行動しており、しばしば目に見えない危険に直面する。すべてに注意深く耳を傾けつつ移動し、自分自身とガイガーカウンター以外には何も信用してはならない。ゾーンで生き残るためには、直感と熟練の技、そして冷静な判断力が必要となる。
 
  ゲームの特徴： 
 
   東欧を舞台に、アクション、ステルス、ホラー、サバイバル、ロールプレイングの要素を掛け合わせたダークなSF。
   時間が永遠に止まった危険な場所で孤立する独特の設定。
   プリピャチなどの実際のチョルノブイリ立入禁止区域が登場。
   変化に柔軟に対応可能な優れたAIが組み込まれた対戦相手とNPC。
   選択肢によってエンディングが分岐するストーリー。
   ゲームプレイに影響を与える昼夜のサイクルや天候のダイナミックな変化。
   1つのマップに最大32人が参加できるマルチプレイヤーモード。

 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  About the Game The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Om spillet I 1986, indtraf verdenshistoriens største atomkatastrofe på atomkraftværket i Tjernobyl. De sovjetiske myndigheder etablerede en 30 km bred 'Udelukkelseszone' rundt om denne radioaktive ødemark, men i 2006 rystede endnu en eksplosion den hærgede reaktor, udslettede alle levende væsner og fik zonens grænser til at bevæge sig udad. Fra dette epicenter strømmede bølger af muterede skabninger, dødbringende stråling og en underlig, abnorm energi. Zonen blev afspærret af militæret, som var parat til at åbne ild mod enhver, som var tåbelig nok til at trodse rædslerne.
 					Vi er nu i 2012. Folk har vovet sig længere og længere ind i hjertet af Zonen, drevet af beretninger om besynderlige 'artefakter', som er gennemsyret af abnorm energi. Lejesoldater og skattejægere kæmper om at få fat på disse artefakter, som kan indbringe svimlende summer på det sorte marked. Andre forsøger at finde sandheden bag Zonen, mens atter andre blot nyder stedets ubeboelige lovløshed. Uanset, hvad der driver dem, er disse individer - klunsere, overtrædere, eventyrere, eneboere, dræbere, opdagelsesrejsende og røvere - blevet kendt som S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s.
 					Du vågner op i Zonen som en sådan S.T.A.L.K.E.R. og kæmper for at overleve i dette menneskeskabte helvede, mens du prøver at finde frem til sandheden om Tjernobyls dystre fortid og ildevarslende fremtid.
 					  Et gribende handlingsforløb blandes gnidningsløst med en levende, åndende, ikke-lineær åben verden, som styres af det revolutionerende 'A-Life'-system.
 					  Modelleret nøjagtigt efter virkelige bygninger og steder fra dybt inde i Tjernobyls udelukkelseszone.
 					  Enestående 'Survival FPS'-gameplay - kombinerer action-, snigeri-, overlevelses- og rollespilselementer til en oplevelse uden sidestykke i Zonen.
 					  AI-system til vurdering af fjendetrusler - computerstyrede karakterer reagerer dynamisk på omgivelser og situationer.
 					  Brutalt realistisk kampmekanik - våben har nøjagtige, ballistiske egenskaber og kan modificeres med lyddæmpere og teleskopsigter.
 					  Dynamisk døgn- og vejrsystem påvirker gameplayet direkte.
 					  Avancerede fysiske effekter og dynamiske lyseffekter drevet af den specielle 'X-Ray Engine'.
 					  Intens multiplayer-action, der understøtter op til 32 spillere.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Preparati a entrare nella Zona a tuo rischio e pericolo per fare fortuna. Potresti perfino arrivare a scoprire la verità nascosta nel cuore di Chornobyl!
  * UN'EPICA STORIA NON LINEARE IN UN VASTO MONDO APERTO
 * TANTI NEMICI E CENTINAIA DI COMBINAZIONI DI ARMI 
 * MUTANTI LEGGENDARI CON DIVERSI MODELLI DI COMPORTAMENTO 
 * MANUFATTI DI INCREDIBILE VALORE E ANOMALIE PERICOLOSE 
  Scopri il leggendario universo di S.T.A.L.K.E.R. e troverai!
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco La Zona ti aspetta, un luogo stracolmo di incomprensibili meraviglie e misteriose insidie... un tempo zona di alienazione nei pressi della Centrale Nucleare di Chornobyl. Si tratta di uno dei luoghi più pericolosi della Terra, reso ancor più misterioso in seguito a un oscuro incidente avvenuto nel 2006. Anomalie che custodiscono preziosi reperti, mutanti famelici e avidi criminali hanno invaso questo territorio insieme agli stalker, alla ricerca di una nuova vita ed espedienti per arricchirsi... Diventa uno di loro in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! RICERCA 
 Per sopravvivere, un vero stalker non deve mai smettere di cercare. Solo trovando reperti preziosi, equipaggiamento, rifornimenti, nuovi amici, scorciatoie e risposte agli enigmi più lugubri di questi luoghi potrai riuscire a cavartela. Preparati a lottare per trovare il tuo destino nel centro della Zona, il luogo più protetto dalle intrusioni di ospiti indesiderati. PERICOLO 
 La missione di uno stalker per raggiungere il proprio obiettivo non è certo una passeggiata. Un'anomalia insidiosa, capace di fare a pezzi anche il guerriero più esperto, la presenza di mutanti assetati di sangue o un tradimento inaspettato... sono tutti pericoli in agguato che potrebbero costarti la vita. Preparati a mettere alla prova la tua abilità e la tua intraprendenza, resistendo ai nemici e ai mutanti in soverchiante superiorità numerica. Non abbassare la guardia neppure quando sei solo... Qui nella Zona, nulla è ciò che sembra. DESOLAZIONE 
 Queste terre desolate, avvolte da un autunno senza fine, pullulano di centinaia di vagabondi. Nonostante tutto, lo stalker è sempre solo, pronto a fronteggiare pericoli spesso imprevisti. Ascolta attentamente ogni rumore, pondera ogni singolo passo e non fidarti di niente e di nessuno, fatta eccezione per il tuo contatore Geiger. Solo l'intuizione, unita all'abilità e ai nervi saldi, potranno salvare uno stalker solitario ed evitargli di finire disperso nella Zona.
 
  Caratteristiche di gioco: 
 
   Un mix di azione, furtività, orrore, sopravvivenza ed elementi RPG nell'oscura e fantascientifica ambientazione dell'Europa orientale.
   La peculiare atmosfera di solitudine all'interno di un luogo estremamente pericoloso, dove il tempo si è fermato per sempre.
   Le ambientazioni ricreate nel gioco si basano sulla vera zona di alienazione di Chornobyl: Pripyat, ChNPP e molti altri scenari.
   Nemici e personaggi non giocanti sono dotati di una complessa IA che gli permette di vivere la propria quotidianità e reagire ai cambiamenti.
   Una storia non lineare dove le tue scelte potranno condurti a finali differenti.
   I cambiamenti dinamici nel ciclo giorno-notte e nelle condizioni meteo influiscono sul gameplay.
   Modalità multiplayer con un massimo di 32 giocatori presenti su una singola mappa.

game.title: #hasicontent
game.description:
Take fotos of the bunnys in your garden

Hasi (noun) [colloq.]

 German for Bunny

  #hasicontent  is a micro-game about taking photos of wild Bunnys in your garden for your friends on Instagram. 

 Carrots bring all the bunnys to the yard, but they cost you 100 likes. But the Bunnys will tell their friends and more show up in the future.

 The game has no goal. Just watch cute Bunnys for one or two minutes and give them carrots. They'll love it :)

  Controls:

  Move the camera with the Arrow-keys Snap photos with X Throw a carrot with C
  Behind the game:

  My girlfriend and I moved to a new apartment recently and discovered wild  Bunnys in our garden. They were so cute, i had to take photos of them and share them with my friends on Instagram. So i made a tiny game about it. 

 Lo-Fi Bunnys to chill and snap photos to.

game.title: Samurai Aces
game.description:
Samurai and ninja fly in the sky!
 
Freaky Japanese-style shooter known as the debut of "Psikyo". 
 
 Samurai Aces is a vertical-scrolling shooter game that first appeared in arcades in 1993.
 
 The roots of "Psikyo shooter" are here, with the randomly chosen levels, eccentric bosses, dramatic demo, and the vicious aiming bullets that would later be called "Psikyo Bullets".
 
  You can set the difficulty level, life, number of continues, 
 controls, screen orientation, and more.
 
 In addition, now we have online rankings! Be the world's best Samurai Ace!  

Characters:   

• Blonde haired kunoichi "Jane"
   • Turbo monk "Tengai"
   • Super genius dog "Ken-oh-maru"
   • Rampaging maiden "Koyori"
   • Macho samurai "Aine"
   • Anatomic machinist "Gen-nai"   

Planes:   

• Power up with "P" items, with sub-weapons also added.
   • Get bombs with the "B" item to wipe out enemy bullets and evade your foes!
   • Unleash the super shot to take down your enemies!   

Arcade mode:   

• 7 levels of difficulty can be selected for beginners.
   • Now players can really test out their skills with a "HARD" and "VERY HARD" mode. We're looking for recruits who are up for the test.
   • Local rankings will support all difficulty levels and your own planes.   

Options:   

• The vertical screen mode that allows you to play in arcade style like back in the day.
   • Select the screen filter from the normal +2 version.
   • You can set the number of lives from 1 to 9 and the number of continues from 0 to unlimited.
   • Assign "Shot", "Auto Shot" and "Bomb" in the key configuration.
   • The vertical screen mode can be operated in the horizontal mode as well! Now enjoy a completely different gameplay.   

Score Attack:   

• This is a new feature that has a very severe mode with a fixed difficulty level and number of lives.
   • Compete in high scores and score attacks against players from all over the world!
   • Online rankings can be viewed from the options menu.

localized_description.text:
Samurai and ninja fly in the sky!
 
Freaky Japanese-style shooter known as the debut of "Psikyo". 
 
 Samurai Aces is a vertical-scrolling shooter game that first appeared in arcades in 1993.
 
 The roots of "Psikyo shooter" are here, with the randomly chosen levels, eccentric bosses, dramatic demo, and the vicious aiming bullets that would later be called "Psikyo Bullets".
 
  You can set the difficulty level, life, number of continues, 
 controls, screen orientation, and more.
 
 In addition, now we have online rankings! Be the world's best Samurai Ace!  

Characters:   

• Blonde haired kunoichi "Jane"
   • Turbo monk "Tengai"
   • Super genius dog "Ken-oh-maru"
   • Rampaging maiden "Koyori"
   • Macho samurai "Aine"
   • Anatomic machinist "Gen-nai"   

Planes:   

• Power up with "P" items, with sub-weapons also added.
   • Get bombs with the "B" item to wipe out enemy bullets and evade your foes!
   • Unleash the super shot to take down your enemies!   

Arcade mode:   

• 7 levels of difficulty can be selected for beginners.
   • Now players can really test out their skills with a "HARD" and "VERY HARD" mode. We're looking for recruits who are up for the test.
   • Local rankings will support all difficulty levels and your own planes.   

Options:   

• The vertical screen mode that allows you to play in arcade style like back in the day.
   • Select the screen filter from the normal +2 version.
   • You can set the number of lives from 1 to 9 and the number of continues from 0 to unlimited.
   • Assign "Shot", "Auto Shot" and "Bomb" in the key configuration.
   • The vertical screen mode can be operated in the horizontal mode as well! Now enjoy a completely different gameplay.   

Score Attack:   

• This is a new feature that has a very severe mode with a fixed difficulty level and number of lives.
   • Compete in high scores and score attacks against players from all over the world!
   • Online rankings can be viewed from the options menu.

game.title: Love at First Sight
game.description: After falling in love at first sight with the shy Sachi Usui, an injury-ridden, single-eyed high school girl, the protagonist tries to win over her lonely and isolated heart. A pure, heart-warming romance game where the apple of your eye only has one eye!

game.title: Eden*
game.description:
A tale of the planet's final love story told using the full force of minori's critically acclaimed illustrative style, engaging musical compositions, and the highly talented staff that has led fans coming back for more every single time!

The final love story on a dying planet.
In the near future, an ominous red star suddenly appears in the sky. Its presence is about to bring about the extinction of all life on Earth. The unified government proposes an evacuation project to take all of mankind into space, but in order to make the seemingly impossible project a reality, 'felixes' are brought into the world. Engineered to be highly intelligent with perpetual youth and longevity, the genetically modified superhuman felixes stand as humanity's only hope for survival.

Sion, the most gifted of the felixes, has been kept in a research facility built on a solitary island for the past hundred years. Her sole purpose, saving all of humanity. Ryou Haruna, a soldier from the Earth's unified government is sent to watch over Sion, who desperately seeks freedom from the military that's imprisoning her. Earth's last love story is about to begin.

game.title: Clannad
game.description:
Clannad follows the life of Tomoya Okazaki, a high school delinquent who meets many people in his last year at school, including five girls, and helps resolve their individual problems.

The gameplay of Clannad follows a branching plot line which offers pre-determined scenarios with courses of interaction, and focuses on the appeal of the five female main characters by the player character. The game was ranked as the best-selling PC game sold in Japan for the time of its release, and charted in the national top 50 several more times afterwards.

Tomoya Okazaki is a third year high school student at Hikarizaka Private High School, leading a life full of resentment. His mother passed away in a car accident when he was young, leading his father, Naoyuki, to resort to alcohol and gambling to cope. This resulted in constant fights between the two until Naoyuki dislocated Tomoya’s shoulder. Unable to play on his basketball team, Tomoya began to distance himself from other people. Ever since he has had a distant relationship with his father, naturally becoming a delinquent over time.

While on a walk to school, Tomoya meets a strange girl named Nagisa Furukawa, questioning if she likes the school at all. He finds himself helping her, and as time goes by, Tomoya finds his life heading towards a new direction.

Story After the death of his mother, Tomoya Okazaki—a guarded delinquent student at Hikarizaka High School—struggles to not only make sense of the abusive relationship he has with his alcoholic father, but also find meaning in his life. While on his way to class one morning, he meets a mystifying girl named Nagisa. She is a delinquent like him, but only because she is repeating her senior year, unlike the perpetually tardy Okazaki. From their brief encounter, Nagisa decides they should be friends, and enlists Tomoya's help to revive the school drama club. Not being busy in any way, he decides to join in. Along the way, the two make friends with many other students and try to find both solace and belonging in their endeavors. New Features  HD Upgrade 
 All visuals have been upgraded to 1280x960 for the Steam release of CLANNAD.
 
  Dangopedia 
 Exclusive to the English version of CLANNAD is the term encyclopedia, Dangopedia! It's a handy reference tool for understanding aspects of Japanese tradition and pop culture.
 
  Achievements 
 Steam achievements are supported! There's also an in-game menu to review your progress.

game.title: Undertale
game.description:
A small child falls into the Underground, where monsters have long been banished by humans and are hunting every human that they find. The player controls the child as they try to make it back to the Surface through hostile environments, all the while engaging with a turn-based combat system with puzzle-solving and bullet hell elements, as well as other unconventional game mechanics.

"A long time ago, two races ruled peacefully over the Earth: HUMANS and MONSTERS. One day, a terrible war broke out between the two races. After a long battle, the humans were victorious. They sealed the monsters underground with a magical spell.

In the year 201X, a small child scales Mt. Ebott. It is said that those who climb the mountain never return.

Seeking refuge from the rainy weather, the child enters a cave and discovers an enormous hole.

Moving closer to get a better look... the child falls in.

Now, our story begins."

game.title: Venba
game.description:
Venba is a narrative cooking game, where you play as an Indian mom, who immigrates to Canada with her family in the 1980s. Players will cook various dishes and restore lost recipes, hold branching conversations and explore in this story about family, love, loss and more.

Venba is a narrative cooking game, where you play as an Indian mom, who immigrates to Canada with her family in the 1980s. Players will cook various dishes and restore lost recipes, hold branching conversations and explore in this story about family, love, loss and more.

Cook Mouth Watering Dishes - Venba's recipe book gets damaged when she moves to Canada. Restore the lost recipes to cook delicious mouth watering dishes that serve as a connection to the home left behind.

Explore. Converse, Experience - Get to know the family well, hold branching conversations, and explore as you face the challenges that arise from day to day life.

game.title: The Witness
game.description:
The Witness is a single-player game in an open world with dozens of locations to explore and over 500 puzzles. This game respects you as an intelligent player and it treats your time as precious. There's no filler; each of those puzzles brings its own new idea into the mix. So, this is a game full of ideas.

You wake up, alone, on a strange island full of puzzles that will challenge and surprise you.

You don't remember who you are, and you don't remember how you got here, but there's one thing you can do: explore the island in hope of discovering clues, regaining your memory, and somehow finding your way home.

game.title: Minecraft: Java Edition
game.description:
Minecraft focuses on allowing the player to explore, interact with, and modify a dynamically generated map made of one-cubic-meter-sized blocks. In addition to blocks, the environment features plants, mobs, and items. Some activities in the game include mining for ore, fighting hostile mobs, and crafting new blocks and tools by gathering various resources found in the game. The game's open-ended model allows players to create structures, creations, and artwork on various multiplayer servers or their single-player maps. Other features include redstone circuits for logic computations and remote actions, minecarts and tracks, and a mysterious underworld called the Nether. A designated but completely optional goal of the game is to travel to a dimension called the End, and defeat the ender dragon.

Minecraft: Java Edition (previously known as Minecraft) is the original version of Minecraft, developed by Mojang Studios for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Notch began development on May 10, 2009, publicly releasing Minecraft on May 17, 2009. The full release of the game was on November 18, 2011, at MINECON 2011.

探索随机生成的世界，建造从最简单的住宅到最宏伟的城堡等一切不可思议之物。您可以在创造模式中享用无限资源，也可以在生存模式中挖掘整个世界，合成武器和盔甲，抵御各种危险生物。攀登崎岖的群山，探明复杂的洞穴，挖掘大型矿脉。探索错综的洞穴与石笋洞穴生物群系。用蜡烛照亮世界，展示出自己作为知识渊博的地下冒险者和登山大师的风采！
在携带版(即PE版)的1.2"独乐乐不如众乐乐"更新之后统一了许多不同的平台(包括手机端,win10端等)，原本的称呼不再适合，于是便以其源代码数据库的内部名称"基岩"命名这个版本。从此之后所有携带版、win10版、树莓派等原来单独更新的版本统称为“基岩版”并统一更新。

game.brief:
Minecraft focuses on allowing the player to explore, interact with, and modify a dynamically generated map made of one-cubic-meter-sized blocks. In addition to blocks, the environment features plants, mobs, and items. Some activities in the game include mining for ore, fighting hostile mobs, and crafting new blocks and tools by gathering various resources found in the game. The game's open-ended model allows players to create structures, creations, and artwork on various multiplayer servers or their single-player maps. Other features include redstone circuits for logic computations and remote actions, minecarts and tracks, and a mysterious underworld called the Nether. A designated but completely optional goal of the game is to travel to a dimension called the End, and defeat the ender dragon.

Minecraft: Java Edition (previously known as Minecraft) is the original version of Minecraft, developed by Mojang Studios for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Notch began development on May 10, 2009, publicly releasing Minecraft on May 17, 2009. The full release of the game was on November 18, 2011, at MINECON 2011.

game.title: There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
game.description:
"There is no game: Wrong dimension" is a Point&Click comedy adventure (and Point&Click only!) that will take you on a journey you never asked to go on, through silly and unexpected video game universes.

Will you be able to play along with the "Game" to find your way home?
We sincerely think NOT.

game.title: Metal Gear Solid
game.description:
Metal Gear Solid is a stealth game created by Hideo Kojima which follows the MSX2 video games Metal Gear and Metal Gear 2: Solid Snake. Despite a transition to 3D, Metal Gear Solid's gameplay remains similar to his predecessors. The game utilizes a traditional top-down view and the player must navigate the protagonist Solid Snake through the game's areas without being detected. Detection will set off an alarm which draws armed enemies to his location. Conversations with Snake's allies and cutscenes are used extensively to advance the plot and gain more insight into it. Metal Gear Solid is regarded as one of the greatest and most important video games of all time, and helped popularize the stealth genre and in-engine cinematic cutscenes.

Metal Gear Solid takes place in an alternate history in which the Cold War continued into the 1990s, ending at some point near the end of the 20th century. Coming out of retirement, special agent Solid Snake is called back into the line of duty to take on rogue members of Foxhound, a crack government anti-terrorist squad threatening to launch nuclear-weapons on the White House unless they receive their $1 billion ransom. With only 24 hours to sabotage Foxhound's threat, Snake must infiltrate enemy lines, rescue the two hostages and thwart the terrorists' plans. The demons of his past will challenge him and his will as a soldier shall be tested, as Snake fights to save the world from nuclear devastation.

localized_title.text: 合金装备索利德 Metal Gear Solid

潜龙谍影系列（英文：Metal Gear Solid、日文：メタルギアソリッド，中国大陆旧译“合金装备”，台湾与香港旧译“燃烧坦克”或“燃烧战车”，台湾于PS时期则改译为“特攻神谍”），由日本科乐美（KONAMI）公司发行、小岛制作室（KOJIMA PRODUCTION）的小岛秀夫主导开发的战术类动作游戏系列及相关产物。
小岛秀夫最初由小时候的捉迷藏游戏中得出灵感，打算制作一个类似电影《第三集中营》的游戏，并最后确定潜龙谍影的游戏模式。

game.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
game.description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN 
 							The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose.
 
 							 LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD 
 							Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before.
 
 							 ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE 
 							Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons.
 
 							 YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY 
 							Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities.  The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions.
 
 							 DRAGON RETURN 
 							Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

 							 LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD

 							Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons.
 
 							 YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY 
 							Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities.  The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions.
 
 							 DRAGON RETURN 
 							Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

本作是Bethesda五年磨一剑的《上古卷轴》系列新作，Bethesda将提供充满无限期待与幻想的诺德大陆，本作将会和上古卷轴4拥有同等大小的地图。在这广阔的地图之上，Bethesda工作室给玩家提供了超过120个不重复的地下迷宫，以及5个规模宏大的城市供玩家探索，而玩家将在这个奇异自由的世界踏上史诗性的征程，使用自己心仪的武器装备自己擅长的技能，去和巨兽，飞龙战斗。前作作为引领PC硬件新潮流的RPG，续作的配置则平易近人，不过Bethesda依然为该作注入了新元素，那就是新引擎“创造”打造的重峦叠嶂的规模与细节的华丽。

game.title: Shenzhen I/O
game.description:
"BUILD CIRCUITS. WRITE CODE. RTFM.

- Build circuits using a variety of components from different manufacturers, like microcontrollers, memory, and logic gates.
- Write code in a compact and powerful assembly language where every instruction can be conditionally executed.
- Read the included manual, which includes over 30 pages of original datasheets, reference guides, and technical diagrams.
- Get to know the colorful cast of characters at your new employer, 深圳龙腾科技有限公司 (Shenzhen Longteng Electronics Co., Ltd.), located in the electronics capital of the world.
- Get creative! Design and test your own games and devices in the sandbox.
- Engineering is hard! Take a break and play a brand-new twist on solitaire."

game.title: Sea of Thieves
game.description: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

localized_title.text: 盗贼之海 Sea of Thieves

localized_description.text: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

¡La Liga de contrabandistas ha cruzado el Velo del Diablo! Estos malhechores tienen buen ojo para los placeres de la vida y las manos tan largas como para quitárselos a sus dueños delante de sus narices.
  
  Lo que se traen entre manos en Sea of Thieves es un secreto muy bien guardado, pero tienen trabajo para aquellos piratas que quieran ganarse un poco más de oro mientras se enfrentan a las tripulaciones rivales durante el trayecto. Si quieres ganarte un puesto entre los Contrabandistas, deberás empezar por buscar su guarida…  
  
Descubre el misterio  
  No es de extrañar que los Contrabandistas sean un grupo discreto, pero seguro que eres más que capaz de descubrir alguna pista sobre sus planes a lo largo y ancho de los mares. Tal vez un pirata curioso y que siempre esté alerta pueda descubrir lo que están tramando... 
  
Guarida de contrabandistas  
  Cuando trabajes clandestinamente, debes evitar que te vean por los puestos de avanzada. Los contactos de la Liga de contrabandistas se han instalado en guaridas escondidas por el mapa y protegidas por trampas ocultas que tendrás que evitar (o usar contra tus rivales) para garantizar una entrega segura.
  
Introducir contrabando 
  La Liga aún sigue acostumbrándose a la vida en el Sea of Thieves y necesitan que alguien les eche una mano con el transporte de sus mercancías. Las rutas de Contrabandistas están disponibles en Alta mar, pueden realizarse desde la mesa de misiones y tienen lugar en una ruta dorada que cambiará cada temporada. Esta ruta también está marcada en la mesa de mapas de otros barcos, lo que aumentará el reto de alcanzar el destino sin que la mercancía sufra ningún daño.
  Si encuentras un mensaje en una botella con una marca de contrabandista en otro lugar, también tendrás la oportunidad de participar en una salida de contrabandistas. Estas Travesías emergentes pueden proponer varias rutas con mercancías más exóticas, pero todas están centradas en transportar cargamentos lujosos y frágiles entre las guaridas de contrabandistas. 
  
Mercancía clandestina 
  La Liga de contrabandistas busca un botín que difiera de los típicos cofres del tesoro y calaveras. ¡Prefieren decantarse por el arte, el ron de primerísima calidad e incluso por los barriles de pólvora negra extremadamente potentes! Échales el guante y verás que tienes que tratarlos con cuidado: las botellas de ron se romperán si reciben daños y, aunque pueden resistir un poco más, los barriles de pólvora negra detonan con más fuerza que cualquier otro explosivo entre las olas.
  
Un mundo abierto en evolución 
  Las guaridas no son la única prueba de la llegada de la Liga. Esta temporada, los Naufragios de contrabandistas se pueden encontrar mientras surcas las olas e irán llenos de mercancía rara y valiosa que valdrá la pena rescatar. Algunas de estas mercancías ya han sido recogidas por barcos de esqueletos errantes y también se pueden encontrar objetos esparcidos por las costas, ¡a menos que otra tripulación más avispada se los quede antes!
  
Nuevas recompensas de temporada 
  ¡Una nueva temporada significa nuevos premios que desbloquear en los 100 niveles de renombre! Gana cosméticos, oro, doblones y hasta monedas antiguas aumentando tu rango y viviendo la auténtica vida pirata.
  
Acerca del juego  
Sea of Thieves ofrece la experiencia de piratas definitiva, desde la navegación y el combate hasta la exploración y el saqueo: todo para disfrutar de la vida pirata y convertirte en leyenda. No hay funciones establecidas, tienes total libertad para enfrentarte al mundo y a los demás jugadores como desees.

Tanto si navegas en grupo o en solitario, acabarás cruzándote con otras tripulaciones en esta aventura de mundo compartido..., pero ¿serán amigos o enemigos? ¿Cómo responderás?
     
Un enorme mundo abierto 
  Explora un vasto mundo abierto repleto de islas vírgenes y reinos submarinos. Afronta misiones en busca de botín perdido, forja una reputación con las compañías comerciales y lucha contra enemigos, desde fantasmas y rastreadores oceánicos, hasta megalodones o poderosos krakens. Prueba suerte pescando, traza mapas hasta tu propio tesoro enterrado o elige entre cientos de objetivos opcionales y misiones secundarias.
  
Un juego en constante crecimiento 
  Sea of Thieves es un juego basado en servicios que crece y evoluciona de forma constante, con cada temporada nueva repleta de funciones de juego cada tres meses y eventos regulares del juego. Consulta con frecuencia qué contenido gratuito se ha añadido y comprueba lo lejos que puedes llegar a lo largo de los 100 niveles de renombre de cada temporada para ganar recompensas especiales.
     
Conviértete en una leyenda 
  Durante tu travesía para convertirte en un pirata legendario, podrás amasar botines, granjearte un nombre y usar recompensas para diseñarte un estilo propio. Aventurero, explorador, conquistador... ¿Qué contará tu leyenda?

La Ligue des contrebandiers a traversé le Devil's Shroud ! Cette bande de mécréants a l'œil pour les biens de valeur, et bien sûr, des doigts agiles requis pour les subtiliser à leur propriétaire.
  La nature exacte de leurs activités à Sea of Thieves est un secret bien gardé, mais ils proposent du travail aux pirates qui cherchent à gagner un petit pécule tout en bataillant avec des équipages rivaux. Alors si vous souhaitez entrer en contact avec les contrebandiers, commencez par rechercher leurs repaires...
  
Percez le mystère 
  Sans surprise, les contrebandiers ne sont pas du genre bavard, mais vous parviendrez sûrement à trouver quelques indices sur leurs véritables projets en parcourant les mers. Avec un flair d'enquêteur et une bonne dose de perspicacité, vous pourriez bien percer à jour leurs machinations...
  
Repaires des contrebandiers 
  Quand on agit dans la clandestinité, on n'ouvre pas une échoppe sur les avant-postes. Les contacts des contrebandiers ont préféré s'installer dans des repaires secrets dispersés sur la carte, protégés par des pièges dissimulés qu'il vous faudra éviter (ou utiliser au détriment de vos rivaux) pour livrer votre cargaison.
  
Lancez-vous dans la contrebande 
  Tandis que la Ligue se familiarise avec la vie à Sea of Thieves, elle recherche de la main-d'œuvre pour transporter ses marchandises. Disponibles en mode Hautes mers, des missions de virée des contrebandiers vous attendent à la table des quêtes. Vous devrez suivre une route dorée dont le trajet sera modifié chaque saison. Cette route apparaît également sur les tables à carte des autres navires, vous compliquant la tâche pour atteindre votre destination en gardant intacte votre cargaison.
  Trouver une bouteille à la mer portant le sceau de la Ligue peut également lancer une mission de contrebandier. Ces voyages émergents proposent divers trajets et des marchandises encore plus exotiques, mais tous se résument à transporter des biens précieux et fragiles d'un repaire des contrebandiers à un autre.
  
Cargaison clandestine 
  À la place des traditionnels crânes et coffres au trésor, la Ligue des contrebandiers recherche du butin plus rare : œuvres d'art, rhum précieux, et même les dévastateurs barils de poudre noire ! Cependant, ce sont des marchandises à manier avec prudence. En effet, les bouteilles de rhum peuvent se briser en cas de choc, et les barils de poudre noire, s'ils sont plus résistants, peuvent produire une détonation plus puissante que n'importe quel autre explosif à Sea of Thieves.
  
Un monde en bac à sable en perpétuelle évolution 
  Les repaires ne sont pas les seules nouveautés accompagnant l'arrivée des contrebandiers. Cette saison, vous trouverez également des épaves des contrebandiers disséminées sous la surface. Elles regorgent de butin rare et précieux qui vaut bien le détour ! Des navires squelettes en maraude ont déjà fait main basse sur une partie du butin, et des objets échoués çà et là sur la rive attendent que vous les ramassiez, du moins si un autre équipage attentif ne les a pas repérés avant vous !
  
Nouvelles récompenses saisonnières 
  Qui dit nouvelle saison dit nouvelles récompenses, à déverrouiller via 100 niveaux de renommée. Obtenez des objets cosmétiques, de l'or, des doublons et même des pièces anciennes en grimpant les échelons.
  
À propos du jeu  
Sea of Thieves vous propose une aventure de pirate ultime avec un gameplay directement issu de l'imaginaire de la piraterie : de la navigation, de l'exploration et des chasses au trésor. Comme les rôles ne sont pas prédéfinis, vous pourrez contribuer à ce monde comme il vous plaira.
  
Que vous voguiez en solitaire ou à plusieurs, vous ferez la rencontre d'autres équipages. Mais seront-ils amis ou ennemis ? Et ferez-vous preuve de bienveillance ou serez-vous impitoyable ?

Un vaste monde ouvert 
  Explorez un vaste monde ouvert parsemé d'îles inexplorées et de royaumes sous-marins. Entreprenez des quêtes à la recherche de butin perdu, forgez-vous une réputation auprès des sociétés et affrontez des ennemis, des fantômes aux crabiers en passant par les mégalodons et le puissant kraken. Essayez la pêche, créez des cartes vers vos propres trésors enterrés ou choisissez un des objectifs optionnels qui se comptent par centaines !
     
   Un jeu en perpétuelle évolution 
  Avec chaque saison vous proposant de nouvelles fonctionnalités tous les trois mois, ainsi que des événements en jeu réguliers, Sea of Thieves est un jeu service en constante expansion et évolution. Revenez régulièrement pour voir le nouveau contenu ajouté ainsi que votre progression dans les 100 niveaux de renommée de chaque saison pour obtenir des récompenses spéciales.
     
   Devenez une légende 
  Au cours de votre épopée pour devenir une légende pirate, vous pourrez amasser du butin, vous forger une réputation et définir votre propre style grâce à des récompenses gagnées à la sueur de votre front. Aventurier. Explorateur. Conquérant. Quelle sera votre légende ?
《盗贼之海》是一款开放世界动作冒险游戏，由Rare开发，微软工作室发行，支持的平台包括Windows 10和Xbox One。玩家在游戏中可以像一个海盗一样航行，单人或者组织一个最多四人的小队进行游戏。游戏的特色在于多人合作和玩家对抗。游戏于2018年3月20日全球发行，评论家们的态度则是褒贬不一。

Die Schmuggler-Liga hat den Devil’s Shroud durchquert! Diese Halunken haben ein gutes Auge für die schönen Dinge des Lebens – und flinke Finger, um sie dem eigentlichen Besitzer vor der Nase wegzuschnappen.
  
  Was genau sie in der Sea of Thieves planen, ist ein gut gehütetes Geheimnis, aber sie haben stets Arbeit für Piraten, die sich etwas dazuverdienen wollen und dabei rivalisierende Crews aus dem Weg räumen. Wollt ihr also bei den Schmugglern anheuern, sucht als Erstes nach ihren Verstecken …
  
Lüftet das Geheimnis 
  Schmuggler sind bekanntlich ein verschwiegener Haufen, doch ihr findet auf den Meeren sicherlich einige Hinweise auf ihre Pläne. Ein scharfsichtiger, neugieriger Pirat könnte ihren Machenschaften sicher auf den Grund gehen …
  
Schmuggler-Verstecke 
  Wer abseits der Regeln agiert, wird sich nicht an den Außenposten blicken lassen. Die Kontaktpersonen der Schmuggler-Liga haben sich stattdessen in Verstecken überall auf der Karte niedergelassen, beschützt von Fallen, die ihr vermeiden solltet (oder direkt gegen eure Rivalen einsetzen könnt), um eine sichere Lieferung zu gewährleisten.
   
Schmuggelware 
  Die Liga muss sich noch an das Leben auf der Sea of Thieves gewöhnen und braucht daher Hilfe beim Transport ihrer Waren. Die Routenfahrten der Schmuggler sind auf dem Offenen Meer verfügbar und können am Missionstisch gestartet werden. Sie finden entlang einer goldenen Route statt, die jede Saison wechselt und auch auf den Kartentischen anderer Schiffe verzeichnet ist. Das Ziel mit intakter Fracht zu erreichen, ist also durchaus eine Herausforderung.
  Wer eine Schmuggler-Flaschenpost findet, kann auch eine Schmuggler-Fahrt starten. Diese auftauchenden Seefahrten bieten verschiedene Routen mit noch exotischerer Fracht, verlangen aber alle, wertvolle Waren von einem Schmuggler-Versteck zum nächsten zu transportieren.
  
Geheime Fracht 
  Die Schmuggler-Liga gibt sich nicht mit den üblichen Schatztruhen und Schädeln zufrieden. Es geht um seltene Beute, von Kunstwerken und hochwertigem Rum bis hin zu wirklich starken Schwarzpulverfässern! Diese Fracht müsst ihr äußerst sorgfältig behandeln. Rumflaschen zerbersten, wenn sie Schaden nehmen. Schwarzpulverfässer sind zwar etwas widerstandsfähiger, wenn sie jedoch zerstört werden, habt ihr auf eurem Schiff eine heftige Explosion.
  
Sandbox im Wandel 
  Nicht nur die Verstecke künden von der Ankunft der Liga. In dieser Saison könnt ihr überall Schiffswracks der Schmuggler entdecken, voller seltener Fracht, die einen Umweg wirklich wert ist. Umherziehende Skelettschiffe haben schon einen Teil der Ladung für sich beansprucht. Einige verstreute Gegenstände werden auch an den Stränden angespült – also, wer zuerst kommt …
  
Neue Saisonbelohnungen 
  Eine neue Saison bedeutet auch neue Belohnungen, die ihr durch das Aufsteigen in den 100 Stufen der Berühmtheit erhalten könnt! Verdient euch Anpassungen, Gold, Dublonen und sogar Antike Münzen, während ihr die Ränge durch Piratentaten erklimmt.
  
Infos zum Spiel  
Sea of Thieves bietet dir das Piratenerlebnis schlechthin. Vom Segeln und Kämpfen bis zu Erkundungen und Beutezügen findest du alles, was das Piratenherz begehrt. Ohne festgesteckte Rollen hast du die Freiheit, der Welt und anderen Spielern so zu begegnen, wie du es willst.
  
Ob du nun in einer Gruppe oder alleine in See stichst, begegnest du in diesem Shared-World-Abenteuer anderen Crews – doch werden sie dir feindlich oder freundlich gesinnt sein? Und wie wirst du reagieren?
  
Eine weitläufige offen Welt 
  Erkunde eine weitläufige offene Welt voller unberührter Inseln und Unterwasser-Reiche. Stell dich Missionen, um verschollene Beute zu finden, dein Ansehen bei den Handelskompanien aufzupolieren und gegen Feinde wie Phantome und Krabbenkrabbler, aber auch Megalodons und mächtige Kraken, zu bekämpfen. Versuche dich am Angeln, zeichne Karten zu deinem vergrabenen Schatz oder wähle aus hunderten anderer optionaler Ziele und Nebenmissionen!
  
Ein stetig wachsendes Spiel 
  Mit jeder Saison werden alle drei Monate neben regulären Events im Spiel auch neue Spielfunktionen eingeführt. Sea of Thieves ist ein Service-basiertes Spiel, das stetig weiter wächst und sich weiterentwickelt. Schau regelmäßig vorbei, um zu sehen, welche kostenlosen Inhalte neu hinzugefügt wurden, und finde dann heraus, wie weit du in den 100 saisonalen Stufen der Berühmtheit aufsteigen kannst, um spezielle Belohnungen zu erhalten.
  
Werde zur Legende 
  Auf deinem Weg, eine Piratenlegende zu werden, wirst du so manchen Schatz plündern, dir deinen eigenen Ruf erarbeiten und deinen ganz eigenen Stil im Umgang mit deinen hart erarbeiteten Schätzen finden müssen. Abenteurer. Entdecker. Eroberer. Welche Art von Piratenlegende wirst du sein?

La Lega dei Contrabbandieri ha attraversato il Devil's Shroud! Quest'orda di criminali ha fiuto per le cose belle della vita e, naturalmente, la mano lesta per sottrarle da sotto il naso dei legittimi proprietari.
  
  La vera natura dei loro affari nel Sea of Thieves è un segreto ben custodito, ma hanno incarichi per quei pirati che vogliono guadagnare un po' d'oro in più affrontando ciurme rivali sul loro tragitto. Quindi, se hai intenzione di cimentarti in questa impresa con i Contrabbandieri, comincia a cercare i loro nascondigli...   
  
Svela il mistero  
  I Contrabbandieri, come prevedibile, hanno la bocca cucita, ma di certo da qualche parte nei mari si possono scovare indizi sui loro piani. Forse un pirata dall'occhio attento e dallo spirito curioso riuscirà a svelare i loro intrighi... 
  
I rifugi dei Contrabbandieri  
  Quando agisci nell’ombra, è meglio non farsi beccare negli avamposti. I contatti della Lega dei contrabbandieri, invece, si sono stabiliti nei rifugi nascosti su tutta la mappa, protetti da trappole nascoste che dovrai aggirare (o usare a tuo vantaggio contro i rivali) per garantire una consegna sicura.
  
Contrabbando di merci 
  La Lega deve ancora abituarsi alla vita nei mari di Sea of Thieves, per cui ha bisogno di una mano per consegnare la merce nel posto giusto.  Disponibili in alto mare, le Scorribande sulla rotta dei Contrabbandieri si possono accettare dal Tavolo delle missioni e si svolgono lungo un tragitto dorato che cambia ogni stagione: un percorso segnato anche sul Tavolo della mappa delle altre navi, rendendo più arduo portare il carico a destinazione sano e salvo.
  
Se da qualche parte trovi un messaggio in bottiglia contrassegnato dai Contrabbandieri, avrai l'opportunità di affrontare un Traffico dei Contrabbandieri. Questi viaggi emergenti propongono diverse rotte con merci ancor più esotiche, ma hanno come obiettivo il trasporto furtivo di merci fragili e preziose da un rifugio dei contrabbandieri a un altro. 
  
Merci clandestine 
  Al posto dei soliti forzieri e teschi, la Lega dei contrabbandieri cerca bottini più rari, che vanno da opere d’arte e rum pregiato fino a potenti barili di polvere nera! Metti le mani su questi bottini, ma dovrai maneggiarli con cura: le bottiglie di rum si romperanno se danneggiate, e anche se i barili di polvere nera possono reggere qualche colpo, la loro esplosione è più potente di qualsiasi altro ordigno presente sui mari.
  
Un ambiente in evoluzione 
  I rifugi non sono l'unico segnale dell'arrivo della Lega. I relitti dei contrabbandieri punteggiano i mari in questa stagione, carichi di merci rare e ambite, che valgono una deviazione per essere recuperate. Le navi degli scheletri erranti sono già pronte a reclamare parte di queste merci, mentre alcuni oggetti sparsi possono anche essere trovati arenati sulle coste, a meno che un altro equipaggio dall'occhio attento non li trovi prima!

Nuove ricompense stagionali 
  Ogni stagione porta con sé una nuova serie di ricompense, che possono essere sbloccate avanzando tra i 100 livelli di fama! Ottieni oggetti cosmetici, oro, dobloni e perfino monete antiche mentre scali i ranghi vivendo da vero pirata.
  
      Informazioni sul gioco  
Sea of Thieves ti coinvolge in un'esperienza piratesca totale, dalla navigazione ai combattimenti, fino all'esplorazione e ai saccheggi: vivi da filibustiere ed entra di diritto nella leggenda. Senza ruoli prestabiliti, disponi della libertà più totale per affrontare il mondo e gli altri giocatori nel modo che preferisci.
  
Avventurati in gruppo o in solitaria e incontra altre ciurme di pirati in questo mondo condiviso... Saranno amichevoli oppure ostili? E tu come reagirai?
  
Un vasto mondo aperto 
  Esplora un vasto mondo aperto, ricco di isole incontaminate e regni sottomarini. Vai alla ricerca di tesori perduti, fatti una reputazione con le Compagnie di commercio e affronta svariati nemici, dai fantasmi e i lombrichi oceanici fino ai megalodonti e persino il possente kraken. Mettiti alla prova nella pesca, segui le mappe fino ai tesori sepolti o scegli tra centinaia di obiettivi e missioni secondarie opzionali.

Un gioco che cresce continuamente 
  Proponendo ogni tre mesi una diversa stagione con nuove funzionalità, oltre agli eventi di gioco regolari, Sea of Thieves è un gioco e un servizio in continua crescita ed evoluzione. Torna regolarmente per scoprire quali nuovi contenuti gratuiti sono stati aggiunti e vedere fin dove riesci a spingerti nella scalata dei 100 livelli di Fama stagionali che ti offrono ricompense speciali.

   Diventa una Leggenda 
  Nel tuo viaggio per diventare una Leggenda pirata deprederai bottini, ti costruirai una reputazione e svilupperai uno stile personale e inconfondibile con ricompense ottenute duramente. Avventuriero. Esploratore. Conquistatore. Come entrerai nella leggenda?

game.brief: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

game.title: Guild Wars: Collector's Edition
game.description:
In a world torn by conflict, where human kingdoms are all but destroyed and guilds sacrifice all for a chance to control the Hall of Heroes, a champion must rise from the ruins of a once-proud land to lead refugees from the ashes and fulfill an ancient prophecy. Will that hero be you?

The Guild Wars Collector's Edition box includes:
- Exclusive in-game Divine Aura for your characters
- Logitech Internet Chat Headset
- Teamspeak Software (custom version)
- Artbook "The Art of Guild Wars" with 128 Pages
- Guild Wars Soundtrack CD

Across Tyria, the human kingdoms are under attack by the vicious Charr. As a young hero caught between the powerful will of King Adelbern and the rebellious Prince Rurik, you are called upon to defend humanity. Will you become an instrument of the ancient prophecy or be crushed beneath it? Rally your strength and the power of your guild to establish your legend.
